detail.tip: Only play this version with augment "Two Tanky". You can also go for alternative double tank if Ornn is too contested, such as Jax 3 + Jax 2 or two Nunus.

augments.name: May The Fours Be With You

detail.tip: Best on Serpent, Boar, Altar, and Mountain Stargazer. Fountain is -1 tier in strength. Huntress and Medallion are much weaker so avoid if possible. NOVA provides free Sunder. If you have Sunder, drop Aatrox for Shen.
Ideally played with Space Groove Emblem. If you don't have Riven items, you instead play Tahm Kench 2 as primary tank with Space Groove emblem + full items -> drop Riven entirely if so.

Always focus on strong frontline. If you get emblem, 7 Shepherd is worth chasing. Play from high econ loss-streak opener to get Leblanc BIS. You can play 3star leona as tank if you print her but morgana 2 is stronger.

Try to hold onto 1 Akali and 1 Aatrox when pushing so you have access to free Shred/Sunder. Graves build: Assault frame -> Buckshot ->  Buckshot+ -> Buckshot++ -> Laser Ballistics. If you have bad Graves items, go tank build or ditch Graves entirely for another upgraded 5 cost / Morgana.

Ideally played from a win streak with lots of resources and items for backline. Save tears for Nunu items. 4 Vanguard is shown but frontline is quite flexible. Sona likes leftover mana / utility items. Bard likes AP items. Vex is also another 5 cost to flex in over Bard if you have items for her. Always keep Rhaast on the board.

Ideally played with some special item (Anima cash out, Radiant item, 2+ Artifacts, etc) + Combat augment. Always keep everything in Mecha form. Can play Urgot + TK + Fiora instead of the Morgana / Rhaast / Morde package.

Item prio: Tank + Jinx > Bel'Veth > Akali take leftover items. Primordian package can be flexed out for other Brawler tanks if you can't get 3* Reksai/Briar. Challenger and Primordian (cut Briar) emblems are strong for the comp too. Can also chase Miss Fortune secondary carry if you have extra swords.

Tempo composition that is best played from ahead and with a strong special item. Best Psionic = Malware Matrix on Yi. Related trait emblems are good: Marauder > Brawler = Psionic > Challenger. Sunder is very important but only build 1 of Last Whisper or Evenshroud (not both as shown).

Best on Mountain (stage 2) > Medallion > Fountain / Altar > Serpent > Huntress > Boar. If on Medallion, Lulu still prints gold on casts even if Stargazer is not active. Your tank will likely change every game depending on what's available / contested (Pantheon 3 > Maokai 3 > Jax 3).

augments.name: May The Fours Be With You

detail.tip: Always aim for 6 Dark Star. Late game if you lack AD items, prioritize: Jhin 2 > Kai'Sa 2 > Jhin 1. Level 7 and 8 are very flexible -- most common to play 4 Dark Star + Vanguards Shepherd (Illaoi / Meepsie) / Brawlers (Pantheon) / Rogues (Riven). Emblems are good: Dark Star > Sniper >> Voyager, Rogue, Tank.
Best with Nova emblem so you can drop Caityn and play a flex 5 cost (Shen > Fiora / Graves). Use Nova selector on Kindred. NOVA provides free Sunder / Shred.

Play when you have lots of copies of Lissandra with strong likelihood of getting her AP Crit items. Dark Star emblem is strong so you can 6 Dark Star on level 8. Cap with Jhin and Karma taking leftover items. Prio ionic spark ASAP.

This comp is played in two ways: Standard 1 cost reroll of slow rolling above 50 at levels 4/5 or push for 7 Meeple to print Veigar 3 (example: Worth the Wait Poppy). Then move down to 5 Meeple for the board once you finish 3* Veigar.

Roll on 6 to stabilize first on Gnar 2 + Timebreakers -> Push for 7 Meeple to print Gnar 3 -> Push for level 9. Ideally end game you end on only 3 Meeple with 5 costs, but most games you will play 5 Meeple.

Riven items are flexible, but make sure to have Sterak or IE or DB on her to activate AD form. DO NOT play Bard at lvl 8 over Voyager -- Instead, add him on lvl 9 with Shen over Poppy. Milio is worth itemizing if you have extra items as a 3rd damage carry.

Last 2 slots are highly flexible. Most common setup will be 4 Vanguard, but you can also play Bastions, 5 costs, Voyagers, etc. Always prioritize whoever you 2* first on the rolldown. Composition needs lots of items so prioritize item Gods / augments.

Best played with Snipers Focus or good Deathblade starts. Play Lissandra until Nami. Lulu 3 > Nami 2 > Lulu 2. If you can't get Ornn 3, look for Maokai 3 instead. Can play Jax tank over Ornn if you have Mountain Stargazer.

Look for Arbiter that prints Leona or gains AP. Ideally you have full items for Zoe + Asol + Bard by end game but you likely will only itemize two. Morde 3 can also tank instead of Leona if you have Concentration or another reason to chase 3*.

NOVA Strike on Aatrox for full board AOE stun or on Caitlyn for damage. Ideally played with NOVA emblem to fit everything on 8. Stargazer package can be played if on Medallion constellation. Corki or Kindred take leftover AD / anti-heal.
Best on Mountain (stage2) > Medallion > Altar > Boar > Serpent Huntress. Item priority: Jax / TF > Caitlyn. 4 Fateweaver is the max cap but you can play Rhaast + Rogue until you find Corki.
Yasuo God Hex buffs can be very good for Cho'Gath. Ezreal and Cho'Gath permanently scales with takedowns so killing units early is good. Rush 4 Timebreaker after hitting to push levels.
Nami takes leftover AP and utility items. Often you will be contested so level to 8 and play for 2* only -> aim for Top 4.

Optimized version still being tested. Can also play for Zoe 3* or Challenger Miss Fortune 3* if you get excess sword / bow items and no Anima. Look for Arbiter that gives Resists or permanent HP per 3 attacks / 4 seconds / damage 10 times. Anima cash out is optional, but nice to hit extra copies of Illaoi / Aurora.

Prioritize items on Briar > Bel'Veth / Kai'Sa. Positioning shown is for most of early and mid game, but late game you can play a standard default melee carry positioning. Rhaast on 8, Jhin on 9. Tahm 2 is a better tank than Reksai 3.

Positioning is very important! Follow guide and put Pyke one hex left or right from back center hex to be opposite side of enemy carry.  All psionic items are good except for drone, Target lock optics->Pyke, Biomatter->Panth/Gragas, All other Psionic items->Gwen.

Situational comp played with Invader Zed augment. Zed can fit in a lot of comps as long as your frontline is strong (TK 2 + Maokai > Nunu 2 + Blitz). Zed is very good with Brawler or Meeple emblem (make sure to play 3+ Meeple).

Positioning is key to get the middle of the board open for Pyke to jump on enemy carries. Good with extra team slots to play more Voyagers. Can also play Viktor as duo carry if your Psionic item is good for him (Drone > Implant). Rhaast and Nami can go in on at 8.

Positioning example shown for Huntress. Best Stargazers: Mountain = Huntress  > Medallion > Altar > Fountain > Serpent > Boar. Take lots of item and econ augments to hit the board. Prioritize Jax items > Pantheon > Millio. Ideally hit Jax 3 on 4-1 to be on tempo. Don't need to build Shred because of Aatrox NOVA bonus.

Mordekaiser Hero Augment required. Much stronger with Dark Star Emblem so consider taking things that give a Spatula. You can also duo carry Lissandra 3 > Karma if you find her rolling on 6. Leftover AD on Jhin.

Gragas Hero Augment required. +1 tier in strength when played with Sympathetic Implant for Gragas. Also good with +1 Bruiser Emblem so you can fit 6 Bruiser / 4 Psionic quicker. Bruiser emblem goes on Yi. Pyke 3 is only worth chasing if you have excess items.

S tier with Arbiter that can print Leona so you can push levels. Max cap would be permanent Max HP since her ability scales with max HP and AD. Vex 2 / Bard 2 can replace backline Arbiters end game (especially if Leona print is your Arbiter since its irrelevant late game).

If you don't have good Psionic item, replace with Hand of Justice or Striker's Flail. Comp is flexible with number of Voyagers. Gragas 3 is not necessary since Brawler can be hard to fit unless you hit Tahm Kench.
NOVA provides Shred/Sunder built into trait. If hit Aatrox early, can carry Caitlyn 2 into Corki and Poppy 2 tank items to Rammus/Morgana.

Don't reroll on low levels. Instead, use the 2 star to tempo win streak and finish printing the 3 star with 7 meeple -> go fast 9 and 10. Board shown is only the end game cap so it's important to flex Stage 4 with units like Mighty Mech + Meepsie.
Always aim for 6 Vanguard. If you can't hit Teemo 3, push levels for Leblanc instead. Preferably choose a tanky Arbiter trait. If you have Space Groove emblem, you can drop Leblanc for Nami.

entries.name: May the Fours Be With You
